label: The Violet Cot
description: The Violet Cot is a narrow chamber cut into the basalt-block mass of The Ashlight Canteen, its walls clad in riveted sheet metal to resist the ash-world’s grit and charge. A low sleeping platform and a footlocker sit on a grated deck fitted with a central drain, mirroring the taproom’s washdown pragmatism. Gasketed shutters over a slit-window and a double-latched inner door hold back wind-driven ash while grounded chains and ceiling baffles dampen static discharge. Illumination comes from a violet-glass sconce that stains the room in bruise-colored light and flattens detail into hard-edged shadow.
